PAINTER-BENT_BRUSH.title: Bent Brush
PAINTER-BENT_BRUSH.description: The first time you Paint each combat, Paint 1 more of that Color. Refreshes whenever you shuffle your draw pile.
PAINTER-BENT_BRUSH.flavor: A trusty tool, slightly warped by years of use.
PAINTER-BROKEN_BRUSH.title: Broken Brush
PAINTER-BROKEN_BRUSH.description: Gain [E] at the start of your turn. NL At the end of your turn, remove all Colors on the Canvas.
PAINTER-BROKEN_BRUSH.flavor: Shattered, yet still channeling raw creative energy.
PAINTER-REPAIRED_BRUSH.title: Repaired Brush
PAINTER-REPAIRED_BRUSH.description: At the start of each combat, Darken the Canvas.
PAINTER-REPAIRED_BRUSH.flavor: Mended with care, it hums with a deeper power.
PAINTER-BRILLIANT_BRUSH.title: Brilliant Brush
PAINTER-BRILLIANT_BRUSH.description: When you Paint a random Color, Paint an additional one.
PAINTER-BRILLIANT_BRUSH.flavor: Every stroke reveals a hidden spectrum.
